Projects

Case studies built around scale, judgment, and measurable outcomes.

These projects are the clearest examples of backend and platform work where architecture, performance, delivery, and business impact all show up together.

Featured

Dynamic scheduling engine

Designed and optimized a slot-based scheduling engine for high-volume booking, rescheduling, and cancellation workflows.

PythonScheduling servicesDatabase optimizationCaching
Featured

AndGo platform scaling and modernization

Led backend and platform modernization across fleet, scheduling, pricing, and engineering systems, pairing architecture direction with measurable improvements in delivery and business outcomes.

PythonFlaskFastAPIGraphQL
Featured

Routing optimization engine

Designed routing optimization for mobile technicians across multi-location field operations, using travel time, service duration, and time windows instead of simplistic distance logic.

Backend servicesOptimization logicTravel-time modelingOperational workflows

Additional work

These projects broaden the portfolio without competing with the flagship backend and platform case studies.
